title: A New Horizon in the City of Dreams

scenes.concept: Julien confidently navigates through a busy street with a laptop in hand.
scenes.context: Julien is standing on a bustling street of a large, creative city, surrounded by modern architecture. He holds a laptop, weaving through the crowd with ease.

scenes.concept: Julien discusses a project with his colleague over the phone.
scenes.context: In a modern loft, Julien is animatedly talking on the phone with Character B, who is visible as a silhouette. The loft is filled with artistic elements.

scenes.concept: Julien is deeply focused on his laptop, surrounded by creative energy.
scenes.context: In a vibrant open workspace, Julien is intensely focused on his laptop, surrounded by colleagues, including Character B, who is seen from behind.

scenes.concept: Julien completes his project successfully and feels accomplished.
scenes.context: In the same bustling city, Julien stands with a sense of achievement. Character B congratulates him with a friendly gesture. Julien looks towards the camera with a satisfied smile.
